description: Carry your laptop in style with this fabulous bag from turtle. With ample space for office accessories as well as your laptop, the bag is best suited for office and general heavy duty use. You'll not only enjoy the practical use of the bag, but you can also rest easy knowing that you're supporting a company who care about the Earth. The brand has a great program in place for saving sea turtles in Orissa. Height: 40 cm Width: 30 cm Depth: 8 cm Made of nylon for durability One main magnetic button and zippered compartment with flap and buckle design, a padded laptop holder and a velcro closure Organiser pouches in the main compartment for carrying essentials One zipped pocket at the back A strap at the back fastened by a velcro closure One long adjustable and removable handle for carrying ease Branding embossed on the front Care Clean with a damp cloth when necessary
